---
title: 'What does it mean to be Empowered To Prosper?'
date: '2017-04-24T17:59:00.0020000+00:00'
draft: true
blogger_blog: 'Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller'
blogger_status: 'LIVE'
blogger_post_id: '948564724724990033'
blogger_filename: '/2017/04/what-does-it-mean-to-be-empowered-to_24.html'
blogger_source: 'takeout-20260223T235336Z-3-001.zip:Takeout/Blogger/Blogs/Darrell Wolfe, Storyteller/feed.atom'
categories:
  - 'Spiritual Growth'
---

<div><i>*I'm combining several former blogs into one, some pages or posts are being republished. Enjoy!</i></div><div><br /></div><h4>What does Empowered Too Prosper Mean?</h4>Those who belong to Jesus are EMPOWERED TOO PROSPER. <br /><br />I say TOO because we are ALSO:<br /><br />The curse came into this earth as a result of Adam's sin. We are redeemed from sin through the finished work of Jesus. The Blessing of Adam, Noah, Abraham, then Jesus is now restored to US. We have all the blessing says we have. We are redeemed from the curse and the blessing has been restored to us. Abraham was <a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=abraham+blessed">BLESSED</a>! If you research people who walked in THE BLESSING throughout the scripture you see that they all prospered in every way. So to be BLESSED is to be empowered to prosper, spiritually, physically, financially, socially and in all other ways.<br /><br />THE original BLESSING that was passed to us:<br /><br /><b>Adam:</b><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/genesis/1-28.html">Genesis 1:28</a><br /><br />28 Then God blessed them, and God said to them, "Be fruitful and multiply; fill the earth and subdue it; have dominion over the fish of the sea, over the birds of the air, and over every living thing that moves on the earth."<br /><br /><br /><b>Abraham:</b><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/genesis/12.html">Genesis 12</a><br /><br />1 Now the Lord had said to Abram: "Get out of your country, From your family And from your father's house, To a land that I will show you. 2 I will make you a great nation; I will bless you And make your name great; And you shall be a blessing. 3 I will bless those who bless you, And I will curse him who curses you; And in you all the families of the earth shall be blessed."<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/genesis/passage.aspx?q=genesis+14:14-24">Genesis 14:14-24</a><br /><br />18 Then Melchizedek king of Salem brought out bread and wine; he was the priest of God Most High. 19 And he blessed him and said: "Blessed be Abram of God Most High, Possessor of heaven and earth; 20 And blessed be God Most High, Who has delivered your enemies into your hand." And he gave him a tithe of all.<br /><br /><b>To Believers: </b><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/galatians/3-14.html">Galatians 3:14</a><br /><br />14 that the blessing of Abraham might come upon the Gentiles in Christ Jesus, that we might receive the promise of the Spirit through faith.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nlt/romans/8-11.html">Romans 8:11</a><br /><br />11 The Spirit of God, who raised Jesus from the dead, lives in you. And just as he raised Christ from the dead, he will give life to your mortal body by this same Spirit living within you.<br /><br /><b>The Result:</b><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/proverbs/10-22.html">Proverbs 10:22</a><br /><br />22 The blessing of the Lord makes one rich, And He adds no sorrow with it.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nlt/mark/passage.aspx?q=mark+16:15-18">Mark 16:15-18</a><br /><br />15 And then he told them, "Go into all the world and preach the Good News to everyone, everywhere. 16 Anyone who believes and is baptized will be saved. But anyone who refuses to believe will be condemned. 17 These signs will accompany those who believe: They will cast out demons in my name, and they will speak new languages. 18 They will be able to handle snakes with safety, and if they drink anything poisonous, it won't hurt them. They will be able to place their hands on the sick and heal them."<br /><br />We are Empowered to Prosper through His Word. Come take a journey with me. My Daddy in heaven takes GREAT JOY in my prosperity and your too.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/psalms/35-27.html">Psalms 35:27</a><br /><br />27 Let them shout for joy and be glad, Who favor my righteous cause; And let them say continually, "Let the Lord be magnified, Who has pleasure in the prosperity of His servant."<br /><br /><b>Other Scripture:</b><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/galatians/3-13.html">Galatians 3:13</a><br /><br />13 Christ has redeemed us from the curse of the law, having become a curse for us (for it is written, "Cursed is everyone who hangs on a tree"),<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/joshua/passage.aspx?q=joshua+1:6-8">Joshua 1:6-8</a><br /><br />6 Be strong and of good courage, for to this people you shall divide as an inheritance the land which I swore to their fathers to give them. 7 Only be strong and very courageous, that you may observe to do according to all the law which Moses My servant commanded you; do not turn from it to the right hand or to the left, that you may prosper wherever you go. 8 This Book of the Law shall not depart from your mouth, but you shall meditate in it day and night, that you may observe to do according to all that is written in it. For then you will make your way prosperous, and then you will have good success.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/psalms/35-27.html">Psalms 35:27</a><br /><br />27 Let them shout for joy and be glad, Who favor my righteous cause; And let them say continually, "Let the Lord be magnified, Who has pleasure in the prosperity of His servant."<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/deuteronomy/8-18.html">Deuteronomy 8:18</a><br /><br />18 And you shall remember the Lord your God, for it is He who gives you power to get wealth, that He may establish His covenant which He swore to your fathers, as it is this day.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/nkjv/deuteronomy/28.html">Deuteronomy 28 </a><br /><br />Describes THE BLESSING and the Curse! If it's under the curse you've been redeemed from. Including poverty and sickness of all kinds.<br /><br /><a href="http://www.biblestudytools.com/search/?q=blessing+of+abraham">Genesis 28:4</a><br /><br />And give you the blessing of Abraham, To you and your descendants with you, That you may inherit the land In which you are a stranger, Which God gave to Abraham."<br /><br /><br /><br /><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;; font-size: 18.0pt;">Darrell G. Wolfe</span><span style="font-family: &quot;times new roman&quot; , serif; mso-bidi-font-family: &quot;Times New Roman&quot;; mso-bidi-font-size: 12.0pt; mso-bidi-theme-font: minor-bidi;"><o:p></o:p></span></div><div class="MsoNormal"><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;"><br /></span><span style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Storyteller | Writer | Thinker | Consultant |&nbsp;</span><a href="https://www.ted.com/talks/emilie_wapnick_why_some_of_us_don_t_have_one_true_calling?language=en" style="font-family: &quot;tempus sans itc&quot;;">Multipotentialite</a></div><div class="MsoNormal"><br /></div>
